## Checklist

- [ ] I tested the change locally.
- [ ] `bun run check`
- [ ] `bun run test:unit`
- [ ] `bun run test:e2e`
- [ ] `cargo test` from `src-tauri/`
- [ ] I updated README/docs for user-facing behavior changes.
- [ ] I did not include Steam API keys, Store tokens, full Steam IDs, or private paths.
